title: Eval Test Case
description: Schema for eval test cases used to validate agent behavior. Evals are defined per agent and run against compiled targets. See .docs/stlc/eval-strategy.md for full specification.

type.description: Eval type. Determines how the test is executed and what artifact it validates.

description.description: Optional description of what this eval validates.

target.description: Which agent or target this eval applies to. Required for most eval types.

query.description: The validation query (e.g., prompt text to search for, LLM prompt to evaluate, regex pattern).

expectedResult.description: For simple evals, whether the result should be true or false.

threshold.description: For scoring evals (LLM judge), minimum acceptable score.

examples.name: Instruction clarity
examples.query: Are the instructions clear and actionable?

notes: Eval files are typically YAML or JSON and live in evals/ subdirectories within agents.
See .docs/stlc/eval-strategy.md for full details on eval design and execution.
Custom eval types require implementation support in the eval runner.
